name: Cracker Barrel's Hashbrown Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of chicken soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the next 7 ingredients and mix with hash browns.
2. Place all in a 3-quart casserole.
3. Saute cornflakes in butter and sprinkle on top.
4. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for about 40 minutes.
